hero.label: // Strategic partner
hero.sub: A 360° agency based in Barcelona. We combine marketing, technology, design and legal advisory in one team. For businesses that want to scale without fragmenting providers.

items.title: Diagnosis
items.desc: We audit your current situation and define a clear strategy.

items.title: Proposal
items.desc: We design a tailored plan with the pillars you need.

items.title: Execution
items.desc: Our team works as an extension of yours.

items.title: Scale
items.desc: We iterate, measure and grow with you month by month.

items.title: Marketing 360°
items.desc: Digital strategy, SEM, SEO, Social Ads, Growth Hacking.

items.title: Technology
items.desc: Websites, apps, SaaS, automation and cloud infrastructure.

items.title: Legal & Finance
items.desc: Legal, tax, financial modelling and due diligence.

items.title: Design
items.desc: Brand identity, UX/UI, design thinking and creative direction.

about.label: // About
about.title: We're your team.
about.body: Knock Labs was born in Barcelona with a simple idea: businesses that want to scale deserve an integrated team, without fragmentation or endless contracts. We combine six disciplines under one roof so you can focus on what matters — growing your business.

contact.label: // Contact
contact.title: Tell us about your project.
contact.sub: No commitments. No long contracts. Just a conversation.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Write to us directly.

values.title: No fragmentation
values.desc: One team that talks to itself. No juggling five different providers.

values.title: Real involvement
values.desc: We dive into every project as if it were our own business.

values.title: Results, not reports
values.desc: Reports are a by-product. What matters is the impact on your business.

services_intro.body: We don't sell packaged bundles. We assemble the team your project needs from six pillars working together under one roof.

hero.label: A visual rendering studio
hero.sub: Architectural visualization, product rendering and 3D campaign imagery for studios, brands and spaces.

byKnocklabs.label: Studio
byKnocklabs.body: Knockvision is the premium visualization department of Knocklabs. We work with studios, brands and developers that demand precision, art direction and a final image that communicates before anything is built.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.body: A well-directed image convinces faster than any rushed render.

brief.title: Brief
brief.desc: We understand the project, its scale and its tone before modeling anything.

direction.title: Direction
direction.desc: We define cameras, light, materials and editorial references.

production.title: Production
production.desc: Modeling, materials, lighting and final composition.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.desc: Deliverables ready for campaign, web, press or investors.

finalCta.label: Contact
finalCta.title: Ready to see the project before it is built?

footer.claim: Images that make projects visible before they exist.
footer.descriptor: A visual rendering studio for architecture, product and 3D campaigns. A department of Knocklabs.

architecture.title: Architectural visualization.
architecture.intro: Exterior and interior renders for housing, offices, hospitality and singular spaces. We partner with studios and developers at competition, pre-sale and communication stages.

product.title: Premium product rendering.
product.intro: 3D visualization for launches, campaigns and e-commerce. Accurate materials, editorial art direction and production-ready deliverables.
